Name: ConditionCategoryCodes
Title: Condition Category Codes
Description: Preferred value set for Condition Categories.

Name: ConditionClinicalStatusCodes
Title: Condition Clinical Status Codes
Description: Preferred value set for Condition Clinical Status.

Name: ConditionStage
Title: Condition Stage
Description: Example value set for stages of cancer and other conditions.

Name: ConditionStageType
Title: Condition Stage Type
Description: Example value set for the type of stages of cancer and other conditions

Name: ConditionVerificationStatus
Title: ConditionVerificationStatus
Description: The verification status to support or decline the clinical status of the condition or diagnosis.

Name: CommonLanguages
Title: Common Languages
Description: This value set includes common codes from BCP-47 (http://tools.ietf.org/html/bcp47)

Name: ObsVS
Title: Observation ValueSet
Description: Use all LOINC codes for observations

Name: BodySite
Title: Body Site
Description: The Body Site value set includes values that cover a broad range of anatomical and acquired body structures suitable for identifying a body site.

Name: ClinicalCondition
Title: Clinical Condition
Description: The Clinical Condition value set includes values that cover a broad range of clinical concepts to support the representation of conditions, including problems, diagnoses and disorders.

Name: ClinicalFinding
Title: Clinical Finding
Description: The Clinical Finding value set includes a broad range of values that support the recording of disorders and clinical findings, including observations, judgments or assessments about subjects of care.
